offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes delays in reimbursements. We automate weekly expense reimbursement summaries instead of manual spreadsheet tracking.
problem: Manual tracking of expense reimbursements leads to delays and inaccuracies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on expense tracking solutions
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try weekly summary generation and email notifications for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
